title: amellus strigosus subsp. scabridus
intro: Amellus strigosus subsp. scabridus, also known as rough-leaved thistle, is a subspecies of the thistle plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. The health benefits of Amellus strigosus subsp. scabridus include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for relieving menstrual cramps and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
